title: Aureline stable hybrid retrieval inspector packet
description: Stable metadata-only hybrid retrieval inspector packet. Stable packets classify the query, expose lexical, structural, graph, embedding, and fusion lanes, disclose retrieval epoch and embedder identity, tenant/region/policy boundaries, policy-hidden omissions, signed mirrored-pack compatibility, and export-safe consumer projections. Raw vectors, raw source bodies, raw code-bearing chunks, provider payloads, secrets, ambient authority, and private numeric rank weights are forbidden.
